   realprecision = 96 significant digits (80 digits displayed)
n=5 charpoly=[x - 1, 1; x^2 - x - 3, 1; x^2 + x - 1, 2; x^3 - 4*x + 1, 1]
n=5 slack=0.59387375123694940193084330710944806484293593246184502440202819595322260343552552
